tasks.label: live-test-asistanapp
tasks.command: cd "/Users/busenurakdeniz/Desktop/ilk projem" && dotnet run --project AsistanApp/AsistanApp.csproj > /tmp/asistan_live_test.log 2>&1 & app_pid=$! && sleep 8 && login=$(curl -s -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:5007/api/elderly/login" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"email":"elderly@test.com","password":"1234"}') && echo "LOGIN_RESPONSE:$login" && token=$(printf '%s' "$login" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('token',''))") && if [ -z "$token" ]; then echo "TOKEN_PARSE:FAILED"; else echo "TOKEN_PARSE:OK"; fi && code_sub=$(curl -s -o /tmp/sub.json -w "%{http_code}" "http://127.0.0.1:5007/api/subscription?token=$token") && echo "SUBSCRIPTION_STATUS:$code_sub" && code_emg=$(curl -s -o /tmp/emergency.json -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:5007/api/emergency-alert?token=$token" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"location":"41.0082,28.9784","coords":{"latitude":41.0082,"longitude":28.9784}}') && echo "EMERGENCY_STATUS:$code_emg" && echo "SUBSCRIPTION_BODY:$(cat /tmp/sub.json)" && echo "EMERGENCY_BODY:$(cat /tmp/emergency.json)" && kill $app_pid && wait $app_pid 2>/dev/null || true

tasks.label: live-test-asistanapp-v2
tasks.command: cd "/Users/busenurakdeniz/Desktop/ilk projem" && dotnet run --project AsistanApp/AsistanApp.csproj > /tmp/asistan_live_test_v2.log 2>&1 & app_pid=$! && sleep 8 && login=$(curl -s -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:5007/api/elderly/login" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"email":"elderly@test.com","password":"123"}') && echo "LOGIN_RESPONSE:$login" && token=$(printf '%s' "$login" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('token',''))") && if [ -z "$token" ]; then echo "TOKEN_PARSE:FAILED"; else echo "TOKEN_PARSE:OK"; fi && code_sub=$(curl -s -o /tmp/sub_v2.json -w "%{http_code}" "http://127.0.0.1:5007/api/subscription?token=$token") && echo "SUBSCRIPTION_STATUS:$code_sub" && code_emg=$(curl -s -o /tmp/emergency_v2.json -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:5007/api/emergency-alert?token=$token" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"location":"41.0082,28.9784","coords":{"latitude":41.0082,"longitude":28.9784}}') && echo "EMERGENCY_STATUS:$code_emg" && echo "SUBSCRIPTION_BODY:$(cat /tmp/sub_v2.json)" && echo "EMERGENCY_BODY:$(cat /tmp/emergency_v2.json)" && kill $app_pid && wait $app_pid 2>/dev/null || true

tasks.label: read-live-test-artifacts
tasks.command: ls -l /tmp/asistan_live_test_v2.log /tmp/sub_v2.json /tmp/emergency_v2.json 2>/dev/null || true && echo "---LOG---" && tail -n 40 /tmp/asistan_live_test_v2.log 2>/dev/null || true && echo "---SUB---" && cat /tmp/sub_v2.json 2>/dev/null || true && echo "---EMG---" && cat /tmp/emergency_v2.json 2>/dev/null || true

tasks.label: live-test-python
tasks.command:
cd "/Users/busenurakdeniz/Desktop/ilk projem" && dotnet run --project AsistanApp/AsistanApp.csproj > /tmp/asistan_live_test_py.log 2>&1 & app_pid=$! && sleep 8 && python3 - <<'PY'
import json, urllib.request

def post(url, payload):
    data = json.dumps(payload).encode('utf-8')
    req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=data, headers={'Content-Type':'application/json'})
    with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=10) as r:
        return r.getcode(), r.read().decode('utf-8')

def get(url):
    with urllib.request.urlopen(url, timeout=10) as r:
        return r.getcode(), r.read().decode('utf-8')

base = 'http://127.0.0.1:5007'
code, body = post(base + '/api/elderly/login', {'email':'elderly@test.com','password':'123'})
print('LOGIN_STATUS:', code)
print('LOGIN_BODY:', body)
obj = json.loads(body)
token = obj.get('token','')
print('TOKEN_PRESENT:', bool(token))
code2, body2 = get(base + f'/api/subscription?token={token}')
print('SUB_STATUS:', code2)
print('SUB_BODY:', body2)
code3, body3 = post(base + f'/api/emergency-alert?token={token}', {'location':'41.0082,28.9784','coords':{'latitude':41.0082,'longitude':28.9784}})
print('EMERGENCY_STATUS:', code3)
print('EMERGENCY_BODY:', body3)
PY
kill $app_pid && wait $app_pid 2>/dev/null || true
